commentary:
# Exchange Liquidity Commentary — July 15, 2026

The NYSE demonstrates superior liquidity leadership with the lowest ILLIQ metric (0.0054) and tight spreads (0.6170%), decisively outperforming Nasdaq 100 despite its top ranking. Korea Exchange trails significantly, with ILLIQ nearly 25 times higher (0.1360) and spreads exceeding 1.39%, reflecting structural liquidity constraints. Mid-tier exchanges like Euronext and SIX Swiss show competitive positioning, while London Stock Exchange's elevated ILLIQ (0.0669) suggests execution cost challenges for institutional traders despite its prominent status.
